Invitation

Invitation to {{params.policy_name}}

{{params.owner_name}} has invited you to join their inheritance plan "{{params.policy_name}}". Use the button below to accept the invite.

Accept Invitation

This invite expires on {{params.expires_at}}.

If the button does not work, copy and paste this link:

{{params.app_url}}/invite/claim?invite_id={{params.invite_id}}&claim_token={{params.claim_token}}

If you are asked to enter codes manually, use:

Invite ID: {{params.invite_id}}

Claim Token: {{params.claim_token}}

You are receiving this email because {{params.owner_name}} initiated a secure inheritance invitation through {{params.brand_name}}.
